name: Vehicle Maintenance History Report
query: SELECT name, vehicle, service_date, supplier, driver_name, total_vat_exclusive, spares_cost, service_charges FROM `tabEAH Job Card` WHERE docstatus = 1 {% if filters.vehicle %} AND vehicle = %(vehicle)s {% endif %} {% if filters.from_date %} AND service_date >= %(from_date)s {% endif %} {% if filters.to_date %} AND service_date <= %(to_date)s {% endif %} ORDER BY service_date DESC
